details.test: Task 1: Cheapest silver stud earrings with free shipping under $60
Task 2: Create earrings gift set under $200 and save to wishlist
Task 3: Customize item with size & engraving and choose standard shipping
Task 4: Compare two earrings by warranty and add the better one to cart
Task 5: Find earrings by delivery date and select express shipping
Task 6: Apply SAVE10 coupon and advance checkout steps
Task 7: Add up to three sale earrings under $60 to cart
Task 8: Remove most expensive item so remaining total is under $300
Task 9: Choose earrings, select color, and add gift wrapping
